function v(v)return x[v-(477442-416914)]end for v,j in ipairs({{244667-244666,-349696+350884};{-629096+629097;331270+-330673},{-1043636-(-1044234),423327+-422139}})do while local v=table.insert local j=x local i=string.len local d=type local
